global_description: Large, cylindrical, metallic artillery piece with a long barrel, mounted on a sturdy base with wheels or stationary support, typically dark gray or black, used historically in warfare.

part_details.barrel: Long, cylindrical, metallic, dark gray or black
part_details.base: Sturdy, often with wheels or stationary support
part_details.breech: Rear part of the barrel, thicker and reinforced
part_details.muzzle: Open end of the barrel, slightly flared
